sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 14:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 14:1
items.html: Malchut is called AT, because she consists of all the letters from Aleph to Tav (all the letters of the Hebrew alphabet). It is so because the letters are the vessels of the Sefirot, and all the vessels come from Malchut. (Part 3, Chapter 12, item 2)
